title: Merge ladder RUNG 0: conflict-free rebase + unchanged git patch-id => audit verdict carries forward; native gates on composed tree replace full re-audit
summary: STILL UNLANDED as of 2026-07-14 despite 4+ no-op PASSes — triage keeps scoping this EMPTY because it conflates this with the COMPOSITION carry-forward that wire-rung0 already shipped (go/internal/core/composition_carryforward.go, cycle-804). THOSE ARE DIFFERENT: this item is the distinct AUDIT-VERDICT carry-forward that must ELIMINATE the current full re-audit on rebase. PROOF the work is undone: a clean fleet-rebase today still logs `[orchestrator] ship error GIT_FLEET_REBASE_NEEDED (transient) -> recovery routes to audit (recover:fleet-rebase-reaudit)` and re-dispatches the auditor; after this lands, that same clean rebase must instead write the trivial-rebase composition-verdict ledger entry and SKIP the auditor entirely. If triage finds 'nothing to do', it is WRONG — grep the loop log for `recover:fleet-rebase-reaudit` to confirm the re-audit still fires. OPERATOR-PRIORITIZED (ladder rung 1 of 4). Split from disjoint-composition-fastpath for small-diff landing. Industry canon (Gerrit copyCondition TRIVIAL_REBASE default; bors; research doc knowledge-base/research/merge-concurrency-2026): review verdicts follow the CHANGE (patch-id), gates follow the TREE. Implement: on AUDIT_BINDING_HEAD_MOVED, rebase the lane branch onto new main; if zero conflict resolution AND git patch-id unchanged vs the audited diff, write ledger entry composition-verdict{method:trivial-rebase, lane_audit_ref, patch_id, audited_base, new_base, gate_results}, run the FULL native gate set on the composed tree (compile, go test, ACS suite, apicover -enforce via ciparity runners — repo-wide per ADR-0069), and let ship verifyAuditBinding accept the audit+composition chain. Any conflict or patch-id drift => fall through to existing full re-audit (rungs 1-2 arrive later). Deterministic, kernel-recomputable (re-derive patch-id from both diffs), zero LLM tokens. Measured motivation: audit ran 10x for 8 cycles; this rung alone should collapse most of that.
acceptance: RED: TestTrivialRebase_CarriesAuditForward (clean rebase, same patch-id: ship proceeds after native gates, no auditor dispatch)
RED: TestCompositionVerdict_KernelRecomputesPatchId (tampered entry rejected); ledger verify covers new entry kind
batch soak: audit dispatches ≈ cycle count; go test -race PASS; apicover clean
